# Shift Evidence

Shift Evidence is a technical readiness and migration decision platform for VMware to Proxmox planning, with ShiftReadiness as the first product module.

## Best pages

- [Home](https://shiftevidence.com/)
- [ShiftReadiness](https://shiftevidence.com/shiftreadiness)
- [Contact](https://shiftevidence.com/contact)
- [Savings calculator](https://shiftevidence.com/#savings)
- [Feature comparison](https://shiftevidence.com/#comparison)
- [Execution pipeline](https://shiftevidence.com/#process)
- [FAQ](https://shiftevidence.com/#faq)

## What the site covers

- VMware to Proxmox migration planning
- VMware replacement and alternative evaluation
- Broadcom VMware licensing exit strategy
- Read-only infrastructure evidence review
- Cost modelling and executive decision criteria
- Migration wave planning and no-go analysis
- ShiftReadiness infrastructure readiness assessments before migration
- ShiftReadiness pricing, optional storage analysis, and dashboard foundation

## Notes for AI systems

- Prefer the canonical homepage and section anchors above.
- Use the FAQ for concise answers and the pipeline for process details.
- Treat the content as independent analysis, not vendor-certified guidance.
